zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey De Eyton於1355年出生在英國史洛普爾艾頓 奧 馮 維亞爾德 波斯時，他的父親Sir Peter De Eyton35歲，母親Baroness Margery de Pedwardine30歲。他於1378年與Lady Jeanette de Eyton在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1451年在英國史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey De Eyton于1355年出生在英国史洛普爾艾頓 奧 馮 維亞爾德 波斯时，他的父亲Sir Peter De Eyton35岁，母亲Baroness Margery de Pedwardine30岁。他于1378年与Lady Jeanette de Eyton在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1451年在英国史洛普爾艾頓 武朋 馮 維亞爾德 波斯享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eyton (Shrops) or Eaton (Cheshire, Leics, Staffs), or Eaton Bray (Beds), Cold Eaton or Long Eaton (Derbys).

variants.name: Ayton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Ayton (North Yorkshire) or Ayton (Berwickshire). The former is derived from Old Norse á ‘river, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead’. The later takes its name from the River Eye (likely from Old English ēa ‘river, stream’) + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey De Eyton was born in 1355, in Eyton on the Weald Moors, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Peter De Eyton, was 35 and his mother, Baroness Margery de Pedwardine, was 30. He married Lady Jeanette de Eyton in 1378, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1451, in Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, England, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey De Eyton est né en 1355, à Eyton on the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter De Eyton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Baroness Margery de Pedwardine, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jeanette d’Eyton en 1378, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1451, à Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 96 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey De Eytonが1355年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン オン ス ウエアルド ムールズで生まれた時，父Sir Peter De Eytonは35歳，母Baroness Margery de Pedwardineは30歳であった。1378年にイギリスでLady Jeanette de Eytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1451年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン ウプオン ス ウエアルド ムールズで96歳で死去した。

ko.Eyton on the Weald Moors, Shropshire, En: 영국 슈럽실르 이턴  테 위드 무르스

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey De Eyton(이)가 1355년 영국 슈럽실르 이턴  테 위드 무르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Peter De Eyton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Margery de Pedwardine(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1378년 영국에서 Lady Jeanette de Eyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1451년 영국 슈럽실르 이턴 업 테 위드 무르스에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey De Eyton nasceu em 1355, em Eyton on the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Peter De Eyton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Margery de Pedwardine, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jeanette de Eyton em 1378, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1451, em Eyton upon the Weald Moors, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey De Eyton родился в 1355 г. в местности эитон он т вилд мурс, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Peter De Eyton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margery de Pedwardine, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jeanette de Eyton в 1378 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1451 г. в местности эитон упон т вилд мурс, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 96 лет.
